commands.review_summary:
The PR reloads workspace skill commands for `/skill <name>` when an empty precomputed list was supplied, adds regression tests, and moves stale `/stop` cutoff handling before skill discovery.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +147. Total +153 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes by source inspection and the linked live report: current main treats an empty precomputed skill list as authoritative, so `/skill <name>` can return unknown even when the workspace skill exists.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer action to fix the guard ordering and provide redacted real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor setup proof gate.

target.title: fix(commands): make /skill load workspace skills
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes #88056.

- Reload workspace skill commands for `/skill <name>` when the directive pass only supplied an empty placeholder list.
- Preserve authoritative empty skill command lists when there is no loader, so filtered/no-skill turns still stay empty.
- Move the `/stop` stale-message cutoff ahead of skill discovery and dispatch so queued stale skill commands cannot execute side-effecting skill tools.

## Verification

- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD -- src/auto-reply/reply/commands-info.ts src/auto-reply/reply/commands-info.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-inline-actions.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-inline-actions.skip-when-config-empty.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/commands-info.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-inline-actions.skip-when-config-empty.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `/skill <name> [input]` should invoke an available workspace skill command instead of returning `Unknown skill` when the directive pass provided an empty placeholder list.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout on the rebased PR branch using the repo Vitest wrapper.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/commands-info.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-inline-actions.skip-when-config-empty.test.ts`

Evidence after fix: Added regression coverage for named `/skill` reloading from an empty precomputed list, preserving authoritative empty lists without a loader, inline `/skill` workspace reload, and stale `/skill` messages being skipped before skill loading/tool dispatch.

Observed result after fix: `Test Files 2 passed (2); Tests 38 passed (38)` and final autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

What was not tested: Live chat provider end-to-end delivery was not exercised; this PR uses focused command-handler and inline-action tests for the implicated path.
target.author: monkeyleet
